content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

October 30, 1990

James W. Mountain  
Deputy General Counsel  
The Metropolitan Water District of Southern California  
P.O. Box 54153  
Los Angeles, CA 90054

Re: Your Request for Advice  
Our File No. I-90-594

Dear Mr. Mountain:

This letter is in response to your request for confirmation of the telephone advice provided to you on September 14, 1990, regarding the filing and disclosure obligations of directors and staff of the Metropolitan Water District of Southern California (the "district") under the provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1 Your request for advice is general in nature and does not concern a specific decision before your agency. Consequently, we treat your letter as a request for informal assistance pursuant to the provisions of Regulation 18329(c) (copy enclosed).2

Your letter correctly summarizes our advice. Pending adoption of regulations to implement and interpret the provisions of Section 87200, as amended, district directors and staff should continue to file Commission Form 730, Statements of Economic Interests, pursuant to your agency's conflict of interest code. Please note, however, that this advice may change upon adoption of regulations implementing Section 87200 at a later date. You will be notified of any changes in the filing status of these officials.

1 Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.

2 Informal assistance does not provide the requestor with the immunity provided by an opinion or formal written advice. (Section 83114; Regulation 18329(c).)

We trust this letter adequately responds to your inquiry. Should you have any further questions regarding this matter, do not hesitate to call me at (916) 322-5901.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel

By: Blanca M. Breeze
Counsel, Legal Division

SH:BMB:plh

Enclosure
